exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.note: Down from 335 — legs are carrying fatigue from May 2 + yard work. 2-second controlled lower on every rep, drive through heels. This is intentionally lighter to rebuild without digging a deeper hole.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust Machine
exercises.note: Up 5 lb from 140. Glute-dominant so it won't spike leg soreness. Drive hips fully up, squeeze at the top for 1 second, lower slow. No hyperextension at the top — neutral spine.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.note: Stay at the lighter end today. Add a 2-second pause at peak contraction (heels pulled all the way in) before lowering slow. Quality over load.

exercises.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.note: Light and slow — 3-second eccentric on the way down, feel the hamstring stretch at the bottom, drive hips through to stand. This is a feel-the-movement day, not a max-load day. Keep a soft knee bend, back flat.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Step-Ups
exercises.note: No added weight — just hip drive and balance. Step up, drive the knee, stand fully at the top before stepping down. If your legs feel fine halfway through, that's the point — you're building without accumulating more damage.

exercises.name: Core Circuit
exercises.detail: Dead Bugs × 10/side + Side Plank 30s/side + Pallof Press 20 lb × 10/side · 2 rounds
exercises.note: Controlled and deliberate. Low back flat on dead bugs. Hips don't sag on side plank. Resist rotation on Pallof. Finish strong here.

week.note: Flat bench / cable row / lat pulldown — done
Recovery load — lighter leg press, hip thrust, RDL focus
Push/pull — incline bench + cable row focus
